concept: Craft a sports game where athletes compete in anti-gravity chambers with modular architecture that rearranges itself during play based on audience excitement levels. Teams score by maintaining possession of a momentum-storing sphere that becomes increasingly unstable and powerful the longer it remains in play without scoring. Player movements leave temporary kinetic trails that teammates can surf for speed boosts, while opponents can disrupt these pathways with counter-momentum techniques. Championship matches introduce random gravitational flux zones that require instantaneous adaptation of movement and passing strategies. The ultimate championship takes place in a specially designed arena where gravitational direction shifts every thirty seconds according to a predetermined but secret pattern.
